title: Mn‐Rich MnSb<sub>2</sub>Te<sub>4</sub>: A Topological Insulator with Magnetic Gap Closing at High Curie Temperatures of 45–50 K
type1_summary: No files were confidently identifiable as cleaned, replot-ready tabular source data. The archive contents are figure-associated Origin project files rather than plain tables.
type2_summary: All inspected files are either the ZIP container itself or proprietary Origin .opj project files. These are not directly plottable without specialized software or extraction, so they are classified as Type 2.

classification_notes: The paper itself does not provide a data availability statement, so classification relies heavily on file evidence. The archive contains Origin project files with figure-like names, which strongly suggests source material for figures, but not clean tabular source data. If additional extracted tables or CSV/XLSX files were present, they would need separate inspection.

file_classifications.paper_evidence: The paper analysis reports no data availability statement and no external downloadable data files or URLs; however, the archive itself is a deposited dataset associated with the paper.
file_classifications.file_evidence: 11.8 MB ZIP archive from Zenodo, which contains extracted Origin .opj files. Archive packaging and size suggest a container for underlying data rather than a directly plottable figure table.
file_classifications.reasoning: The ZIP is not directly replot-ready; it is a container holding proprietary Origin project files. Based on the file structure and size, it is best treated as raw/unprocessed or at least non-cleaned source material rather than Type 1 figure data.
file_classifications.ambiguity: Moderate: the archive may contain a mix of source and processed files, but the top-level file itself is only a container, so conservative classification is Type 2.
file_classifications.key_columns_or_structure: ZIP archive containing Origin project files (.opj)

paper_analysis.summary: The paper reports that Mn-rich MnSb2Te4 becomes a ferromagnetic topological insulator with a high Curie temperature and a magnetically driven bandgap closing near the transition.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: No explicit dataset or source data is indicated in the available publisher information.

dataset_characterization.data_organization: No data availability statement was found on the publisher page, and no downloadable data files or external URLs were provided.
